description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a flat, overhanging roof and a prominent wraparound balcony on the upper level. The structure features clean, geometric lines and a minimalist aesthetic, with a combination of light and dark gray exterior walls. The front facade includes a staircase leading up to the balcony, which is bordered by a simple railing. Large windows and sliding doors are visible on the upper floor, providing ample natural light and access to the balcony. The ground floor is partially enclosed, with open space beneath the balcony and a solid support column at one corner. The house sits on a tiled base, suggesting an urban or suburban setting.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, wraparound balcony, and minimalist gray exterior. Features include large windows, a staircase, and a tiled base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the staircase, balcony railing, and main entry area beneath the overhanging roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the open space beneath the balcony and the solid support column at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full extent of the wraparound balcony and the flat roof's overhang.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the balcony's side and the supporting column structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and sliding doors on the upper floor
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a staircase leading to a covered balcony with a simple railing and minimal decorative elements.
